meta.title: Rumah Kayu SC | Traditional Javanese Wooden House Specialist
meta.description: Premium traditional Javanese wooden house provider. Joglo, Limasan, Gladak with finest craftsmanship.
meta.ogAlt: Rumah Kayu SC - Traditional Javanese Wooden Houses

hero.title: Build an Elegant Wooden Home with Classy Traditional Character
hero.description: Rumah Kayu SC presents Joglo, Limasan, and Gladak wooden houses with clean, elegant appearance and natural warmth. Perfect for private residences, villas, relaxation spaces, or commercial buildings seeking more value and character.
hero.cardDescription: The beauty of a wooden house lies not only in its form, but in the warmth, tranquility, and class that you feel from the very first glance.

about.tagline: The beauty of wooden houses crafted with taste, detail, and character.
about.title: Wooden Houses that Look Beautiful and Feel Comfortable
about.description1: Located in Tabanan, Rumah Kayu SC focuses on delivering wooden buildings that are not only visually appealing but also comfortable, highly aesthetic, and give an exclusive impression to every space.
about.description2: We blend traditional architectural character with cleaner, modern, and elegant styling, making it perfect for those who want wooden buildings with strong identity yet relevant for today's needs.

features.title: Why Choose Rumah Kayu SC?
features.description: Every wooden building has a soul, and we design them to look classy, feel warm, and suit the function you need.

items.title: Elegant & Characterful
items.description: Design highlights simple luxury with the strength of traditional nuance.

items.title: Valuable Materials
items.description: The touch of wood gives warmth, naturalness, and a more exclusive appearance.

items.title: Neat Finishing
items.description: Clean and premium look so the building appears luxurious from every angle.

items.title: Flexible for Needs
items.description: Suitable for homes, villas, gazebos, cafes, or commercial areas.

items.title: Easy Consultation
items.description: You can discuss models, sizes, and concepts according to project needs.

products.title: Wooden House Options with Different Charms
products.description: Find the wooden house model that best matches your space character and dreams.

items.title: Joglo
items.description: Majestic, graceful, and full of dignity. Perfect for those who want a wooden house with strong traditional details and an immediately felt premium impression.

items.title: Limasan
items.description: Beautiful roof proportions, balanced appearance, and calm elegant nuance. Ideal choice for comfortable living with timeless traditional beauty.

items.title: Gladak
items.description: Simple, warm, and full of natural character. Perfect for relaxation spaces, guesthouses, gazebos, or natural and aesthetic building concepts.

value.title: Not Just a Building, But an Aesthetic Investment
value.description: Wooden houses have strong visual appeal and create an atmosphere that other materials cannot replace. With the right design, wooden buildings become comfortable, classy spaces that give an exclusive impression to both owners and guests.

location.title: Serving from Tabanan for Your Wooden Building Needs
location.description: Rumah Kayu SC is ready to be your partner in realizing aesthetic, functional, and high-value wooden buildings. Consult your Joglo, Limasan, or Gladak model needs today.

cta.title: Realize Your Dream Wooden House with Rumah Kayu SC
cta.description: Discuss your building model, size, and needs right now. We are ready to help you choose the wooden house concept that best suits your land character, space function, and design taste.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Rumah Kayu SC. All rights reserved.

showcase.title: Wooden Buildings for Cafes & Commercial Spaces
showcase.description: Javanese wood is not just for homes. See how we bring warmth, aesthetics, and strong character to commercial spaces - from exterior architecture to interior details.
showcase.project: Project: Balyand Lifestyle & Kopi Teras Sawah, Bali

showcaseJoglo.title: Joglo House - Wooden Homes with a Traditional Soul
showcaseJoglo.description: Every Joglo we build has its own character. From antique Joglo with fine carved ornaments to modern Joglo with a clean aesthetic - all crafted with quality wood and experienced hands.
showcaseJoglo.project: Joglo project documentation by Rumah Kayu SC
